comments.text: Happy Halloween. Much of the country will have good trick or treating weather this evening through tonight. The exceptions will be for areas of the Pacific Northwest, from the Upper Midwest into the Great Lakes, and across the northern and central Appalachians.
Happy Sunday #stunday When standing in the presence of greatness, we are but small. #FebuARTy #big&small #aurora #lakesuperior
Wishing everyone a safe and relaxing Victoria Day. Hope you’re able to enjoy the long weekend with family and friends—and take in the beauty of Lake Superior and our Northern communities.
Very cool and real clouds and sky for April Fools' Day #clouds #storm #stormsky #aprilfools #greatlakes #lakeontario #springsky #spring #auntieem
Happy #wingFriday! Back in May over blue waters and under blue skies. It’s been cloudy and rainy here lately, starting to feel a lot more like fall
Windy, wintry weather on its way to #WestMichigan ❄️ #MonaLakeChannel #NortonShores #Muskegon

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It has been #wet across most of the region, which is greatly appreciated. The #temperatures remain #cooler by the lake, but it does feel #humid across the area. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Arctic air returns to the Northland. Temperatures remain below zero for lows tonight, with single digits for highs. A breezy northwest wind will make it feel as cold as -30° with snow showers near Lake Superior continuing. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/01/12/s...

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! It's a mild afternoon for those that are seeing plentiful sunshine. Others are dealing with a cool spring day with clouds and a breeze. The South Shore snowbelt will need to ready for a snowy overnight.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #mild afternoon for those that are seeing plentiful #sunshine. Others are dealing with a #cool #spring day with #clouds and a breeze. The #SouthShore snowbelt will need to ready for lake effect #snow […] [Original post on newsie.social]

7:15 P.M. WEATHER UPDATE: #Showers and a few weak #thunderstorms are beginning to move into the #Northland this evening. They will become widespread over the next several hours. Dense #fog is also being reported in the #TwinPorts region and near #LakeSuperior […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a second straight day of #sunshine, #warm #temperatures, and light #winds. Thanks to a lighter lake #breeze, it is a warmer day for some near #LakeSuperior. No big reason to complain about this #spring-time […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Thursday afternoon Northland! The skies are starting to clear of the cloud cover from earlier today as temperatures remain seasonally mild. It is a windy day, especially the farther north you live. It's quite choppy on Lake Superior.

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It is a cooler day thanks to more cloud cover and an east wind. It will keep the waters along Lake Superior choppy. A few showers are starting to form and push through the region. Expect more of that the next few days.

Fog will again be possible across the Northland tonight, but it won’t be as widespread or as dense in spots. Wednesday will see plenty of sunshine with highs warming back to the 70s, with 60s by Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/23/t...

A new high-pressure system will keep the Northland dry tonight, with clouds decreasing throughout Wednesday. A shift in wind direction more to the south will push most highs back to the 70s, with 60s next to Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/30/t...

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! After a warm start to the weekend for nearly everyone in the region, the lake breeze is back along the Lake Superior shorelines. At least we are all enjoying the sunshine. Get's use to it!

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #sunny #summer day for the region, but a #wind shift that is now coming off #LakeSuperior is helping to keep the shoreline communities #cooler and more comfortable. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a slightly #warmer day for the region, but it remains a bit #cool by #LakeSuperior with a bit of #breeze coming from the lake. #Clouds are increasing as a #storm system brings #showers and #thunderstorms later […] [Original post on newsie.social]

DENSE FOG LIKELY TONIGHT: The fog has stayed put over Lake Superior this Wednesday, and it will be forming back over the Northland tonight and Thursday morning. Again, take it easy when traveling about with low beams on!

An Omega High will keep the Northland pretty much dry and warm through next weekend. Other than some patchy lakeshore fog tonight, enjoy the clear skies and light winds with highs Monday in the 70s away from Lake Superior. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/05/04/s...

There are several weather alerts in effect for parts of the Northland. Overall, the windy conditions are worst in the Twin Ports region, both on land and on Lake Superior. Where it isn't raining, fire concerns are very high to extreme.

Dense fog will be likely across the Northland tonight with mild lows and very light winds. The sunshine returns for Thursday, with a light wind coming off Lake Superior will keep highs cooler by the lake. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2025/09/10/w...

The Northland will get a break from the winds and showers as a low-pressure system finally moves out of the Great Lakes region. We will see some sunshine at time Friday with light winds and seasonal temperatures. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2024/11/21/t...

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a more #seasonal early #spring day for the region thanks to #cloud cover and a #breeze off #LakeSuperior. Those in northwest #Wisconsin and the #UpperPeninsula will have to deal with #snow #shower through […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's another #sunny and #warm day for the region, with #cooler by the lake conditions continuing. The #dry conditions also persist, so please be careful with any #burning or #fires the rest of today. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

7 P.M. #RADAR UPDATE: The #severe #weather threat in the #Northland has passed as the line of scattered #showers and #thunderstorms is in the marine layer of air near #LakeSuperior. Some moderate #rainfall and gusty #winds are still possible for the #NorthShore this hour. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a mostly #cool and #dreary day for the region thanks to some #showers, some #fog near #LakeSuperior, and overall #cloud cover. Some spots in northwest #Wisconsin and the #UpperPeninsula are enjoying the #warm […] [Original post on newsie.social]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JULY 3, 2025: A high-pressure system will settle near #LakeSuperior, providing the #Northland with #clear skies Wednesday night, very light #winds, and lows in the 50s. Thursday will see a few #clouds return as winds will be coming off the lake. That will keep high […]

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! The #humidity and #temperatures are higher in the region, but it remains #cooler by #LakeSuperior. There's more #cloud cover, and some additional #showers and #thunderstorms will pass through in a few spots. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Does Wednesday's weather for the #Northland make you want to stay home? 🥶 Cozy up inside with April's VIRTUAL #TwinPorts Freshwater Folk, featuring Dr. Megan Klasic, research social scientist with U.S. EPA's #GreatLakes Toxicology & Ecology Division! 🌊 Register today: z.umn.edu/mnsg_25tpff-...

LATEST ON NEXT STORM SYSTEM: After a calm end to March, April will start off #stormy for the #Northland as a strong #strom system will push through the #GreatLakes region. Heavy #snow #showers will be the main focus Tuesday night for everyone. Then we have to […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! #LakeSuperior is playing a role in today's #weather in the region. Those next to it are #cooler with a lake #breeze, with #fog near the #TwinPorts. Those away from it are enjoying #summer #heat and #humidity. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

After another mostly cloudy and mild night, a shift in wind direction coming off Lake Superior will cool temperatures in the Northland Thursday. Highs will be in the 30s for many on the Minnesota side, with 40s and low 50s elsewhere. VIDEO: www.fox21online.com/2026/03/04/w...

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! Lake Superior is playing a role in today's weather in the region. Those next to it are cooler with a lake breeze, with fog near the Twin Ports. Those away from it are enjoying summer heat and humidity.

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR JUNE 8, 2026: A #warm front brings plenty of #showers and #thunderstorms through the #Northland Sunday night and Monday. #Winds remain light, keeping the #cooler by the lake conditions ongoing. Low #temperatures will be in the 40s, 50s […] [Original post on newsie.social]
Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It has been wet across most of the region, which is greatly appreciated. The temperatures remain cooler by the lake, but it does feel humid across the area.

After the showers move out tonight, fog will linger across the Northland. A light lake breeze will help those next to Lake Superior avoid the worst of the heat and humidity that will cover the region Tuesday. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! Any #fog and #cloud cover is clearing out of the region for the rest of this afternoon and evening. We are all feeling the #muggy conditions, pushing #heat index values into the mid-90s away from #LakeSuperior. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's another cool day with wind chill readings below zero at times. There isn't much sunshine, and nearly all snow showers are taking place along the South Shore.

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! Any fog and cloud cover is clearing out of the region for the rest of this afternoon and evening. We are all feeling the muggy conditions, pushing heat index values into the mid-90s away from Lake Superior.

Gonna be a bit chilly camping this week with lows expected in the 30’s. We’ll be in the #teardrop but now power other than solar. Snuggle up with the three hounds 🐾🐾🐾 . Bitter sweet drive up with the current fire situation, heart goes out to all those affected 🙏
#NorthShore #LakeSuperior

RECAP OF 2024 IN THE NORTHLAND: PART TWO It's time to look at two of the communities that reside along Lake Superior and see how warm and wet(?) last year was. Here's more on Ashland and Grand Marais. Enjoy: www.facebook.com/WeathermanRu...
Happy Sunday, Jon. It's not much warmer here in the Great Lakes area.

REACP OF WET & WINDY STORM: The past 24 hours have played out as forecasted in the Northland. The North Shore saw the highest rainfall totals, but everyone got at least around 0.50". Winds were also gusty, with the highest totals near Lake Superior.

HOW MUCH SNOW & HOW MUCH MORE?: As forecasted, the northern areas of the Northland saw the most snowfall since Sunday, with those north of Highway 2 seeing some accumulation. Lake effect showers resume tonight along the South Shore snowbelt region. Expect a couple inches.

HOW MUCH SNOW & HOW MUCH MORE?: As forecasted, the northern areas of the #Northland saw the highest #snowfall totals since Sunday, with those north of Highway 2 seeing some #accumulation. #Lake #effect #snow #showers resume tonight along the #SouthShore […] [Original post on newsie.social]

LAKE EFFECT ON SOUTH SHORE ALERT: Once winds shift to the northwest and north Friday, the South Shore region of the Northland will see heavy lake effect snow showers form and come on shore through Saturday. Snowfall totals will be impressive, with difficult driving conditions likely.

A little taste of the snow is coming along the Twin Ports region early this afternoon. An east wind is bringing a band of lake effect snow to this region. Let's just say your neighborhood friendly meteorologist and wants to visually show you to be READY FOR SNOW NORTHLAND!
Happy Monday from the gloomy, damp, rainy but unseasonably warm Great Lakes. Climate change is real.

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MARCH 6, 2026: The #fog and #freezing #drizzle will persist across the #Northland Thursday night, especially near #LakeSuperior, with low #temperatures in the 20s and low 30s. A #storm system will bring increased #rain #shower chances Friday with light #winds and highs […]

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MEMORIAL DAY 2026: #MemorialDay 2026 will be very warm for the #Northland with #temperatures away from #LakeSuperior in the 80s for highs thanks to plenty of #sunshine and a southerly #wind. Isolated pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It is basically a repeat of Wednesday's #weather conditions for today. That means plenty of #sunshine and #cooler by #LakeSuperior with a bit of lake #breeze blowing. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 27, 2026: A high-pressure system will keep the #Northland clear of #cloud cover Wednesday night with some lakeshore #fog in a few spots. Low #temperatures will #cool to the 40s. Thursday will see more #sunshine with not much cloud […] [Original post on newsie.social]

A high-pressure system will keep the Northland clear tonight with lows in the 40s. The sunny skies continue Thursday, as well as a lake breeze. That means 60s for highs next to Lake Superior, with 70s and low 80s more inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! There are no fears for severe weather the rest of today with plenty of sunshine overhead. The biggest issue is the wind coming off Lake Superior. It's leading to a wide range of temperatures.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! There are no fears for #severe #weather the rest of today with plenty of #sunshine overhead. The biggest issue is the #wind coming off #LakeSuperior. It's leading to a wide range of #temperatures. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

NORTHLAND FORECAST FOR MAY 27, 2026: After pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms dissipate early Tuesday night, the #Northland will see mostly #clear skies, some lakeshore #fog, and low #temperatures in the upper 40s and 50s. Wednesday will be basically #sunny […] [Original post on newsie.social]

After pop-up showers and thunderstorms dissipate early tonight, the Northland will see dry conditions settle in the next few days. A decent lake breeze Wednesday will keep highs in the 60s next to Lake Superior, with 70s and 80s further inland. VIDEO/DISCUSSION: fox21online.com/weather

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's another summer-like weather day for most of the region. That means a chance for pop-up showers and thunderstorms south of Highway 2. A wind shift to the east will keep the Lake Superior shoreline cooler, but the heat continues one more day.
